headline: Seagate (STX) Is Redeeming $150.7 Million Of Notes Due 2028
summary: Seagate Technology Holdings (NasdaqGS:STX) plans to redeem its 3.50% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2028. The move will eliminate approximately US$150.7 million of debt from Seagate’s balance sheet. This corporate action directly affects Seagate’s capital structure and long term risk profile. Seagate Technology is a major supplier of data storage products, including hard disk drives and related solutions used in cloud, enterprise, and consumer applications. Recent attention around Seagate...
